name: policycheck
description: The ICE Symbolic Registry is a tool designed to continuously map and synchronize the semantic structure of your codebase into a durable, queryable format.

scripts.build:scanner: tsc pkg/assets/scripts/scanner.ts --outDir pkg/assets/dist --module commonjs --target es2020 --declaration false --sourceMap false && tsc cmd/policycheck/policy_scanner.ts --outDir cmd/policycheck/dist --module commonjs --target es2020 --declaration false --sourceMap false && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); fs.rmSync('pkg/assets/dist/scanner.cjs',{force:true}); fs.renameSync('pkg/assets/dist/scanner.js','pkg/assets/dist/scanner.cjs'); fs.rmSync('cmd/policycheck/dist/policy_scanner.cjs',{force:true}); fs.renameSync('cmd/policycheck/dist/policy_scanner.js','cmd/policycheck/dist/policy_scanner.cjs');"
